note: Representative iPad-emulation journey metrics (Chromium, i7-7700, 4x CPU throttle). Regenerated on every CI run of `npm run test:emulation`; the live run attaches this report plus the offline-boot / journey / portrait-lock screenshots as PR artifacts. Emulated, not physically iPad-validated.
device: iPad Pro 11 (1194x834 CSS, DPR 2, touch, spoofed Mobile Safari UA) on Chromium
